title: pgstat — Capacity & Trends
description: Kapasite planlamasi: connection trend, WAL growth, query volume, exec time, DB boyut buyumesi.

list.name: instance
list.query: select display_name as __text, instance_pk as __value from control.instance_inventory where is_active order by display_name
list.label: Instance

panels.title: Bağlantı Trendi (P95)
panels.description: Her instance için P95 bağlantı sayısı. Trend yukarı doğruysa kapasite artırımı düşün.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroupAlias(d.sample_ts, $__interval), i.display_name as metric, percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by d.numbackends) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

panels.title: WAL Üretimi
panels.description: WAL üretim miktarı. Yüksek WAL = yoğun yazma. Archiver geride kalırsa disk dolabilir.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroupAlias(w.sample_ts, $__interval), i.display_name as metric, sum(w.period_wal_size_byte) as value from fact.pg_wal_snapshot w join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = w.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(w.sample_ts) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

panels.title: Sorgu Hacmi (calls)
panels.description: Toplam sorgu çağrı sayısı. pgss_hourly rollup verisinden.

targets.rawSql: select bucket_start as time, i.display_name as metric, sum(h.calls_sum) as value from agg.pgss_hourly h join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = h.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(h.bucket_start) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

panels.title: Toplam Exec Süresi
panels.description: Toplam sorgu çalışma süresi. Artış = yavaşlayan sorgular veya artan yük.

targets.rawSql: select bucket_start as time, i.display_name as metric, sum(h.exec_time_ms_sum) as value from agg.pgss_hourly h join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = h.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(h.bucket_start) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

panels.title: Database Boyut Büyümesi (live tup)
panels.description: Tablo bazlı live tuple toplamı. Hızla büyüyen DB'leri belirler.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroupAlias(t.sample_ts, $__interval), dbr.datname as metric, max(t.n_live_tup_estimate) as value from fact.pg_table_stat_delta t left join dim.database_ref dbr on dbr.instance_pk = t.instance_pk and dbr.dbid = t.dbid where (t.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) and $__timeFilter(t.sample_ts) group by 1, dbr.datname order by 1

panels.title: TPS Trendi (Transactions/sec)
panels.description: Saniyedeki ortalama transaction sayısı (commit + rollback). Kapasite planlaması için kritik metrik.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroupAlias(d.sample_ts, $__interval), i.display_name || ' / ' || coalesce(dbr.datname, '?') as metric, round(sum(d.xact_commit_delta + d.xact_rollback_delta)::numeric / greatest(extract(epoch from '$__interval'::interval), 1)) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk left join dim.database_ref dbr on dbr.instance_pk = d.instance_pk and dbr.dbid = d.dbid where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name, dbr.datname order by 1

select date_trunc('day', d.sample_ts)::date as day, i.display_name as instance, dbr.datname as database, sum(d.xact_commit_delta) as commits, sum(d.xact_rollback_delta) as rollbacks, sum(d.xact_commit_delta + d.xact_rollback_delta) as total_xact, round(sum(d.xact_commit_delta + d.xact_rollback_delta)::numeric / 86400) as avg_tps from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk left join dim.database_ref dbr on dbr.instance_pk = d.instance_pk and dbr.dbid = d.dbid where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name, dbr.datname order by 1 desc, i.display_name, dbr.datname

panels.title: 30 Gün Lineer Tahmin (connection)
panels.description: Son 30 günden lineer regresyon ile 30 gün sonraki P95 tahmini.

targets.rawSql: with daily_p95 as (select i.display_name, date_trunc('day', d.sample_ts)::date as day, percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by d.numbackends) as p95 from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where d.sample_ts > now() - interval '30 days' and (d.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by i.display_name, day) select display_name as metric, regr_intercept(p95, extract(epoch from day)) + regr_slope(p95, extract(epoch from day)) * extract(epoch from now() + interval '30 days') as value from daily_p95 group by display_name
